content: Hi, I'm Hayden Young. I'm a yoga instructor and wellness coach in Los Angeles, CA. I've been struggling to manage my finances and I'm hoping to get some advice.
Hi Hayden, nice to meet you! Congratulations on your work as a yoga instructor and wellness coach. What specific challenges are you facing with managing your finances?

Well, I've been having trouble keeping track of my expenses and income. I've been using a budgeting app, but it's not giving me the level of detail I need. I'm looking for a better way to manage my finances, maybe something that can help me with long-term planning.
There are many great tools out there that can help you with long-term planning. Have you considered using a financial planning software like Mint or Personal Capital?

I've heard of those, but I'm not sure if they're the right fit for me. I'm looking for something that's easy to use and can help me stay organized. I've also been trying to cut back on unnecessary spending, like buying too many podcast subscriptions.

It's great that you're trying to cut back on unnecessary spending. Podcast subscriptions can be a fun way to stay entertained, but they can also add up. Have you considered setting a budget for your entertainment expenses?
That's a great idea. I'll look into setting a budget for my entertainment expenses. I've also been thinking about adopting a dog from a shelter. Do you think that's a good idea?

Adopting a dog from a shelter can be a wonderful idea! However, it's also a significant responsibility and expense. Have you considered the costs of dog ownership, including food, vet bills, and supplies?
I've been thinking about that, and I've decided to adopt a golden retriever named Willow. I've already started preparing my home and budget for the new addition.
Congratulations on your decision to adopt a dog, Hayden! That's exciting news. How do you plan on budgeting for Willow's expenses?
I've been setting aside $100 each month for dog food and supplies. I've also been looking into pet insurance to help cover any unexpected vet bills.
I'm also thinking about starting a marathon training program. Do you think that's a good idea?

Starting a marathon training program can be a great idea, Hayden! However, it's also a significant time commitment and may require some additional expenses, such as new running shoes and gear. Have you considered the costs and time required for the program?
I've been thinking about that, and I've decided to start training for a marathon in 6 months. I've already started looking into training programs and scheduling my runs.

That's great to hear, Hayden! You're taking the right steps towards managing your finances and pursuing your goals. Remember to stay on top of your finances and don't hesitate to reach out if you have any more questions or need further guidance.
I will, thanks. I'm feeling more confident about managing my finances now.

That's great to hear, Hayden. You're taking the right steps towards managing your finances and growing your business. Don't forget to also prioritize your own well-being and self-care, especially with the added responsibility of dog ownership and marathon training.
I will, thanks. I'm excited to start this new chapter in my life.
You're welcome, Hayden. It was great chatting with you. Remember to stay on top of your finances and don't hesitate to reach out if you have any more questions or need further guidance.
